items.title: EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments
items.summary: Researchers introduce EvoArena, a new benchmark and framework for evaluating how LLM agents evolve and manage memory to maintain robustness in constantly changing environments.

items.title: Meta's Months-Old AI Unit Described as a 'Soul-Crushing Gulag' by Engineers
items.summary: Engineers within Meta's recently formed AI unit reportedly describe their working conditions as extremely challenging and demoralizing, raising concerns about internal culture and project pressures.

items.title: Google Sues Chinese Cybercrime Operation Using AI to Scam Hundreds of Thousands
items.summary: Google has filed a lawsuit against a Chinese cybercrime group accused of leveraging AI to defraud hundreds of thousands of victims, highlighting the growing threat of AI-powered scams.

items.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention: Efficient Attention for Large Language Models
items.summary: A new sparse attention mechanism, MiniMax Sparse Attention, is proposed to improve the efficiency of large language models by focusing on the most critical tokens.

items.title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
items.summary: SpatialClaw presents a novel action interface designed to enhance the spatial reasoning capabilities of AI agents, allowing for more intuitive and effective interaction with 3D environments.

items.title: BBVA Integrates OpenAI to Place AI at the Core of Banking Operations
items.summary: BBVA is partnering with OpenAI to embed AI deeply into its banking services, aiming to revolutionize financial operations and customer experiences.

items.title: InterleaveThinker: Reinforcing Agentic Interleaved Generation
items.summary: InterleaveThinker introduces a method for reinforcing interleaved generation in AI agents, enabling them to better combine planning and execution for complex tasks.

items.title: Robust-U1: Can MLLMs Self-Recover Corrupted Visual Content for Robust Understanding?
items.summary: This paper investigates the ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to self-recover and robustly understand visual content even when it is corrupted.

items.title: FORT-Searcher: Synthesizing Shortcut-Resistant Search Tasks for Training Deep Search Agents
items.summary: FORT-Searcher proposes a method to create challenging, shortcut-resistant search tasks, crucial for training more robust and intelligent deep search agents.

items.title: MaxProof: Scaling Mathematical Proof with Generative-Verifier RL and Population-Level Test-Time Scaling
items.summary: MaxProof introduces a new approach to scale mathematical proof generation using a combination of generative-verifier reinforcement learning and population-level test-time scaling.

items.title: OpenAI Launches New Academy Courses for Applying AI in the Workplace
items.summary: OpenAI has introduced new Academy courses designed to equip professionals with the skills needed to effectively apply AI technologies in various work environments.

items.title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
items.summary: LabVLA introduces a new framework for training vision-language-action models specifically designed to operate and assist within complex scientific laboratory environments.

items.title: I Switched to the Agent Toolkit for AWS: Here's Why
items.summary: An AWS developer shares their positive experience and reasons for adopting the Agent Toolkit for AWS, highlighting its benefits for building AI agents.

items.title: I Lead AI Agents Every Day - Here Are 5 Shifts No Standard Tells You How to Make
items.summary: An experienced AI agent leader shares five crucial, non-standard shifts in approach necessary for effectively managing and optimizing AI agents in daily operations.

items.title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
items.summary: EurekAgent proposes that effective environment engineering for AI agents is the key to achieving fully autonomous scientific discovery.
